title: campylospermum scheffleri
intro: Campylospermum scheffleri is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the Scheffler's campylospermum or yellow campylospermum due to its bright yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Campylospermum scheffleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. Campylospermum scheffleri is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in tropical regions.
